title: Dead Star
overview: Claudio Nervi, an eclectic director, and Lucia Neve, a disillusioned producer, are looking for a new actress who can help them with their latest film, a project that is drifting. During a meeting with one of the most promising candidates, Stella, the girl will reveal that the script of the film reminds her of a story she knows very well: the story of how she died.
